vocabulary.example: The laboratory evaluates commodity inspection review under documented environmental conditions.
vocabulary.example_zh_tw: 實驗室在有紀錄的環境條件下評估商品檢驗審查。

vocabulary.pronunciation: en-US · registration of product certification review
vocabulary.example: The report links registration of product certification review to the applicable requirement and result.
vocabulary.example_zh_tw: 報告將商品驗證登錄審查連結到適用要求與結果。

vocabulary.pronunciation: en-US · declaration of conformity scheme review
vocabulary.example: The engineer compared declaration of conformity scheme review with the approved baseline.
vocabulary.example_zh_tw: 工程師將符合性聲明模式審查與核准基準進行比較。

vocabulary.example: The final review found that inspection mark review was consistently documented.
vocabulary.example_zh_tw: 最終審查確認檢驗標識審查已有一致的文件紀錄。

vocabulary.example: The technical record includes objective evidence for commodity classification code review.
vocabulary.example_zh_tw: 技術紀錄包含商品分類號列審查的客觀證據。

vocabulary.example: The customer requested a clear explanation of local supplier review.
vocabulary.example_zh_tw: 客戶要求清楚說明本地供應商審查。

vocabulary.example: The procedure defines the acceptance criterion for batch inspection review.
vocabulary.example_zh_tw: 程序定義了逐批檢驗審查的接受準則。

vocabulary.example: The test plan identifies how type test report review will be controlled and recorded.
vocabulary.example_zh_tw: 測試計畫說明如何控制並記錄型式試驗報告審查。

vocabulary.example: The project team discussed certificate renewal review during the pre-test meeting.
vocabulary.example_zh_tw: 專案團隊在測試前會議中討論了證書展延審查。

vocabulary.example: The assessor reviewed the traceable evidence supporting market inspection review.
vocabulary.example_zh_tw: 評鑑人員審查了支持市場檢查審查的可追溯證據。

common_sentences.english: I will explain how declaration of conformity scheme review affects compliance.
common_sentences.zh_tw: 我會說明符合性聲明模式審查如何影響符合性。

common_sentences.english: Our review found no abnormality in inspection mark review.
common_sentences.zh_tw: 我們的審查未發現檢驗標識審查有異常。

common_sentences.english: Can you confirm the acceptance criterion for commodity classification code review?
common_sentences.zh_tw: 你可以確認商品分類號列審查的接受準則嗎？

common_sentences.english: We isolated local supplier review as the dominant factor.
common_sentences.zh_tw: 我們已確認本地供應商審查是主要影響因素。

common_sentences.english: The customer requested a concise update on batch inspection review.
common_sentences.zh_tw: 客戶要求提供逐批檢驗審查的精簡進度說明。

dialogue.context_zh_tw: BSMI 台灣商品檢驗測試前審查

lines.speaker: Engineer
lines.english: I have verified commodity inspection review and recorded the setup.
lines.zh_tw: 我已確認商品檢驗審查並記錄測試設定。

lines.speaker: Reviewer
lines.english: Good. What evidence supports the decision for registration of product certification review?
lines.zh_tw: 很好。有哪些證據支持對商品驗證登錄審查的判定？

lines.speaker: Engineer
lines.english: The calibrated result, uncertainty record, and setup photographs are linked in the test log.
lines.zh_tw: 校正後的結果、不確定度紀錄與測試設定照片都已連結於測試日誌。

lines.speaker: Reviewer
lines.english: Please confirm the acceptance criterion before releasing the report.
lines.zh_tw: 發布報告前，請確認接受準則。

debug_case.title: Conducted emission fail — BSMI investigation
debug_case.title_zh_tw: 傳導發射超標：BSMI 台灣商品檢驗調查
debug_case.problem: A pre-compliance check on Day 062 shows a repeatable conducted emission fail condition.
debug_case.background: The BSMI configuration was documented before the result was compared with the applicable criterion. This is a realistic training scenario; learners must distinguish observations from hypotheses.
possible_causes: The switching supply has inadequate input filtering.
A common-mode return path couples noise to the mains.
check_steps: Compare line and neutral spectra with both detector modes.
Probe the input filter and switching node.
corrective_actions: Optimize the common-mode choke and X/Y capacitors.
debug_case.supervisor_question: How would you prove the root cause before changing the BSMI design?
debug_case.suggested_answer: I would first verify the setup and reproduce the result. Then I would isolate one variable at a time, record objective evidence, and repeat the measurement after the corrective action.

interview_question.question: Describe your RF test experience. Connect your answer to BSMI.
interview_question.hint_zh_tw: 請說明儀器、標準、測試流程與一項可量化成果。 並連結到「BSMI 台灣商品檢驗」。
interview_question.sample_answer: I plan test configurations, verify instruments, capture traceable results, and investigate abnormal RF behavior. I also explain the technical impact to project teams. In BSMI, I make sure that conclusions are supported by controlled measurements.
interview_question.natural_rewrite: A natural engineering answer uses a clear context, your specific action, objective evidence, and the resulting technical or business impact.

quiz.prompt: 「commodity inspection review」的正確繁體中文是什麼？
quiz.explanation: commodity inspection review 指的是「商品檢驗審查」。

quiz.prompt: 「商品驗證登錄審查」的正確工程英文是什麼？
quiz.explanation: 工程文件中可使用 registration of product certification review。

quiz.prompt: The engineer compared ________ with the approved baseline.
quiz.prompt_zh_tw: 工程師將符合性聲明模式審查與核准基準進行比較。
quiz.explanation: 完整句子的關鍵詞是 declaration of conformity scheme review。

quiz.prompt: 播放語音後，選出你聽到的專業詞彙。
quiz.explanation: 播放內容是 inspection mark review（檢驗標識審查）。

quiz.prompt: Describe your RF test experience. Connect your answer to BSMI.
quiz.prompt_zh_tw: 請說明儀器、標準、測試流程與一項可量化成果。 並連結到「BSMI 台灣商品檢驗」。
quiz.answer: I plan test configurations, verify instruments, capture traceable results, and investigate abnormal RF behavior. I also explain the technical impact to project teams. In BSMI, I make sure that conclusions are supported by controlled measurements.
quiz.explanation: 回答應包含具體行動、工程證據與結果；系統採關鍵概念給分。
